articles.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
articles.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement. The Department says WAR.GOV/UFO has received over 1 billion hits worldwide since its May 8, 2026 launch, which it frames as evidence of major public interest in the topic and in the Trump administration's transparency effort. The statement adds that the Department of War and agency partners are working on a third UAP file release, which will be announced in the near future.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

articles.title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal ‘slush funds’ tied to classified programs
articles.summary: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue. Lawmakers from the House Oversight and Government Committee’s Task Force on Declassification of Federal Secrets, including Reps. Burlison, Moskowitz, Luna and Burchett, joined the briefing and called for permanent immunity for insiders and for the UAP Disclosure Act to strengthen whistleblower protections. War Secretary Pete Hegseth said the Trump administration is releasing declassified UFO files and is committed to unprecedented transparency, while noting that a dozen scientists and associates have recently gone missing, died or been murdered.

en.title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal ‘slush funds’ tied to classified programs
en.summary: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue.

de.title: UFO-Whistleblower drängt Vance, angebliche Milliarden von „schwarzen Geldern“ des Bundes zu untersuchen, die mit geheimen Programmen in Zusammenhang stehen
de.summary: Der ehemalige Geheimdienstoffizier David Grusch sagte Reportern, dass Milliarden von Dollar in geheime Bundesprogramme fließen, die mit Initiativen zur UFO-Absturzbergung in Verbindung stehen und vor dem Kongress und der Öffentlichkeit geschützt sind. Er behauptet, der Regierung seien mehrere Dutzend Fälle mit nichtmenschlichen Biologien bekannt und sie verfüge über Audio-, Video- und Bildmaterial von geborgenen Fahrzeugen. Grusch forderte die Sondereinsatzgruppe von Präsident Donald Trump unter der Leitung von Vizepräsident JD Vance auf, die angeblichen Schwarzgelder zu untersuchen, und nannte die Situation ein Betrugs-, Verschwendungs- und Missbrauchsproblem.

articles.title: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion - Associated Press
articles.summary: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion Posted Jun 12, 2026 08:01:58 AM. LOS ANGELES (AP) — In “Disclosure Day,” out Friday, Steven Spielberg is once again inviting audiences to ponder the existence of extraterrestrial life — and the implications it would have for religion on Earth. But Spielberg is hardly the only one making headlines of late about UFOs and the possibility of life on other planets. What was once considered fringe or conspiratorial has in recent months popped up everywhere from the White House to the Catholic Church, as public fascination with unidentified anomalous phenomena — or UAPs, as the government calls them — becomes more mainstream.

de.title: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte – Associated Press
de.summary: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte. Gepostet am 12. Juni 2026 um 08:01:58 Uhr. LOS ANGELES (AP) – In „Disclosure Day“, der am Freitag erscheint, lädt Steven Spielberg das Publikum erneut dazu ein, über die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens nachzudenken – und über die Auswirkungen, die es auf die Religion auf der Erde haben würde. Aber Spielberg ist nicht der Einzige, der in letzter Zeit Schlagzeilen über UFOs und die Möglichkeit von Leben auf anderen Planeten macht.

articles.title: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026
articles.summary: Spielberg’s 1977 film *Close Encounters of the Third Kind* focused on government secrecy about UFOs and has become a key reference for his 2026 film *Disclosure Day*, which the director says is not a sequel but shares thematic ties. *Disclosure Day*, released on 12 June 2026 and starring Emily Blunt, follows a whistleblower named Daniel who tries to expose decades of hidden evidence of extraterrestrial visitations, echoing the conspiracy‑thriller style of 1970s movies like *Three Days of the Condor*. The piece notes that real‑world UAP investigations, such as the Pentagon’s 2025 report and 2023 congressional hearings, have produced limited evidence and continued public speculation, mirroring the film’s portrayal of government obfuscation. Spielberg’s trailers and statements emphasize that the new film is part of a growing public fascination with whether we are alone in the universe, centering on the tension between truth‑seeking characters and a clandestine agency that seeks to suppress information.

en.title: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026
en.summary: Spielberg’s 1977 film *Close Encounters of the Third Kind* focused on government secrecy about UFOs and has become a key reference for his 2026 film *Disclosure Day*, which the director says is not a sequel but shares thematic ties. *Disclosure Day*, released on 12 June 2026 and starring Emily Blunt, follows a whistleblower named Daniel who tries to expose decades of hidden evidence of extraterrestrial visitations, echoing the conspiracy‑thriller style of 1970s movies like *Three Days of the Condor*. The piece notes that real‑world UAP investigations, such as the Pentagon’s 2025 report and 2023 congressional hearings, have produced limited evidence and continued public speculation, mirroring the film’s portrayal of government obfuscation.

de.title: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist
de.summary: Spielbergs Film „Close Encounters of the Third Kind“ aus dem Jahr 1977 konzentrierte sich auf Regierungsgeheimnisse über UFOs und ist zu einer wichtigen Referenz für seinen Film „Disclosure Day“ aus dem Jahr 2026 geworden, der nach Aussage des Regisseurs keine Fortsetzung ist, aber thematische Verbindungen aufweist. *Disclosure Day*, veröffentlicht am 12. Juni 2026 und mit Emily Blunt in der Hauptrolle, handelt von einem Whistleblower namens Daniel, der versucht, jahrzehntelang verborgene Beweise für außerirdische Besuche aufzudecken, und greift damit den Verschwörungsthriller-Stil von Filmen der 1970er Jahre wie „Drei Tage des Kondors“ auf. Der Artikel stellt fest, dass reale UAP-Untersuchungen, wie der Bericht des Pentagons aus dem Jahr 2025 und die Anhörungen vor dem Kongress aus dem Jahr 2023, nur begrenzte Beweise und anhaltende öffentliche Spekulationen erbracht haben, was die Darstellung der Verschleierung durch die Regierung im Film widerspiegelt.

articles.title: Cosmic Council: Trump creates UFO panel to be advised by Harvard's Avi Loeb
articles.summary: The Trump administration has created a UAP Governance Board to address unidentified anomalous phenomena, holding its first meeting on Tuesday and aiming to improve transparency and interagency coordination. Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will serve as an advisor and head the board’s UAP Science Advisory Council, bringing a scientific perspective to the investigation of UAP incidents. The board will operate without a budget, rely only on declassified information, and may help resolve cases such as the 2023 glowing mothership orb near Cheyenne Mountain, while Loeb notes that about 40 % of observed phenomena remain unexplained by known technology. Loeb has assembled a team of scientists and UFO researchers, including Michael Shermer, Gary Nolan, Kevin Knuth, Matthew Szydagis, and retired Rear Admiral Gallaudet, who has urged the government to prioritize UAP research.

de.title: Kosmischer Rat: Trump gründet ein UFO-Gremium, das von Harvard-Mitarbeiter Avi Loeb beraten wird
de.summary: Die Trump-Administration hat ein UAP-Governance-Board eingerichtet, um sich mit nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen zu befassen. Die erste Sitzung findet am Dienstag statt und zielt darauf ab, die Transparenz und die Koordination zwischen den Behörden zu verbessern. Der Harvard-Astrophysiker Avi Loeb wird als Berater fungieren und den UAP Science Advisory Council des Vorstands leiten und eine wissenschaftliche Perspektive in die Untersuchung von UAP-Vorfällen einbringen.

articles.title: New science advisory council forms to help US government ‘resolve the UAP mystery’
articles.summary: A new UAP Science Advisory Council, led by Harvard professor Avi Loeb, has been created to provide scientific guidance to U.S. government agencies investigating unidentified anomalous phenomena. The council will advise the UAP Governance Board, an interagency body established under a Trump administration directive, which coordinates the declassification of UAP information in line with Executive Order 13526. The council’s membership includes experts in anomaly identification, AI, oceanography, psychology, and materials science, and all data shared with the council will be unclassified. AARO’s latest report, dated June 5 2026, documents anomalous phenomena observed in October 2023, noting that about 40 % of the cases lack a reasonable explanation and remain unresolved. While the council aims to determine whether UAPs pose national‑security threats or represent new discoveries, no evidence to date confirms extraterrestrial activity, and the exact nature of the phenomena remains uncertain.

en.title: New science advisory council forms to help US government ‘resolve the UAP mystery’
en.summary: A new UAP Science Advisory Council, led by Harvard professor Avi Loeb, has been created to provide scientific guidance to U.S. government agencies investigating unidentified anomalous phenomena. The council will advise the UAP Governance Board, an interagency body established under a Trump administration directive, which coordinates the declassification of UAP information in line with Executive Order 13526.

de.title: Neue wissenschaftliche Beiräte bilden sich, um der US-Regierung dabei zu helfen, „das UAP-Rätsel zu lösen“
de.summary: Ein neuer UAP-Wissenschaftsbeirat unter der Leitung von Harvard-Professor Avi Loeb wurde gegründet, um US-Regierungsbehörden bei der Untersuchung nicht identifizierter anomaler Phänomene wissenschaftliche Anleitung zu geben. Der Rat wird das UAP Governance Board beraten, ein behördenübergreifendes Gremium, das gemäß einer Richtlinie der Trump-Regierung eingerichtet wurde und die Freigabe von UAP-Informationen gemäß Executive Order 13526 koordiniert.

articles.title: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action
articles.summary: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action - USA Herald David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action On Tuesday, June 9 at 1:00 p. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, bipartisan lawmakers, whistleblowers, journalists, and filmmakers are expected to gather on the steps of the U. The event is being framed as a direct call for declassification, stronger whistleblower protections, and passage of disclosure-related legislation. Grusch, the former intelligence officer who previously testified under oath before Congress, is expected to discuss non-human intelligence-related evidence he says he encountered through classified channels.

Juni um 13:00 Uhr. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, überparteiliche Gesetzgeber, Whistleblower, Journalisten und Filmemacher werden sich voraussichtlich auf den Stufen der Vereinigten Staaten versammeln. Die Veranstaltung wird als direkter Aufruf zur Freigabe, einem stärkeren Whistleblower-Schutz und der Verabschiedung von Offenlegungsgesetzen dargestellt.

articles.title: Jeremy Corbell Issues UFO Warning: Release Reverse-Engineering and Non-Human Biologics Files — or I Will
articles.summary: Investigative filmmaker Jeremy Corbell has issued a warning to the U.S. government demanding disclosure of alleged UFO crash retrieval, reverse‑engineering, and non‑human biologics programs or else he will release hundreds of undisclosed files. Corbell said that if the government does not provide new information on reverse engineering, non‑human intelligence craft, or biologics, he will release the files he calls “Sleeping Dog.” He claimed that the information is no longer limited to a small group and is not only in his hands or in George Knapp’s. Corbell referenced former intelligence officer David Grusch’s 2023 congressional testimony, which alleged decades‑long crash retrieval and reverse‑engineering of non‑human technology and the existence of biological evidence. No publicly released evidence has independently verified Grusch’s allegations, but his testimony is considered a significant whistleblower claim about UAPs. Corbell’s statement suggests that additional evidence may exist outside official channels.

Corbell said that if the government does not provide new information on reverse engineering, non‑human intelligence craft, or biologics, he will release the files he calls “Sleeping Dog.” He claimed that the information is no longer limited to a small group and is not only in his hands or in George Knapp’s.

de.title: Jeremy Corbell gibt UFO-Warnung heraus: Veröffentlichung von Reverse-Engineering- und nicht-humanen Biologika-Dateien – oder ich werde es tun
de.summary: Der investigative Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell hat eine Warnung an die US-Regierung gerichtet und fordert die Offenlegung angeblicher UFO-Absturz-Bergungs-, Reverse-Engineering- und nicht-humaner Biologika-Programme, andernfalls werde er Hunderte von nicht veröffentlichten Dateien veröffentlichen. Corbell sagte, wenn die Regierung keine neuen Informationen über Reverse Engineering, nichtmenschliche Geheimdienste oder Biologika bereitstellt, werde er die Dateien veröffentlichen, die er „Sleeping Dog“ nennt. Er behauptete, dass die Informationen nicht mehr auf eine kleine Gruppe beschränkt seien und nicht nur in seinen Händen oder in denen von George Knapp lägen.

articles.title: Newly released UFO files allege China and Russia retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse-engineer them
articles.summary: Newly released UFO files made public on June 12 allege that China and Russia have retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse‑engineer them. Jordan Flowers, executive director of the UAP Disclosure Foundation, said the files show foreign adversaries are engaged in research that could threaten U.S. national security. Flowers cited whistleblower David Grusch, who warned that the U.S. is aware of Russian and Chinese surveillance of its UAP programs and that a global race to reverse‑engineer the objects has extreme national‑security implications. The UAP Disclosure Foundation announced a forum in Washington, D.C., on June 25 to discuss the national‑security, technological, and religious implications of UAP disclosure. A CIA cable from July 2, 2008 placed U.S. assets in Zimbabwe on high alert after a UFO hovered over Harare airport, with beams and rotating lights, sparking debate over whether the craft was a foreign reconnaissance device or an extraterrestrial object.

en.title: Newly released UFO files allege China and Russia retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse-engineer them
en.summary: Newly released UFO files made public on June 12 allege that China and Russia have retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse‑engineer them. Jordan Flowers, executive director of the UAP Disclosure Foundation, said the files show foreign adversaries are engaged in research that could threaten U.S. national security. Flowers cited whistleblower David Grusch, who warned that the U.S. is aware of Russian and Chinese surveillance of its UAP programs and that a global race to reverse‑engineer the objects has extreme national‑security implications.

de.title: In neu veröffentlichten UFO-Dateien wird behauptet, dass China und Russland abgeschossene UAPs zurückgeholt und versucht hätten, sie zurückzuentwickeln
de.summary: Neu veröffentlichte UFO-Dateien, die am 12. Juni veröffentlicht wurden, behaupten, dass China und Russland abgeschossene UAPs geborgen und versucht haben, sie zurückzuentwickeln. Jordan Flowers, Geschäftsführer der UAP Disclosure Foundation, sagte, die Akten zeigten, dass ausländische Gegner an Forschungsarbeiten beteiligt seien, die die nationale Sicherheit der USA gefährden könnten. Flowers zitierte den Whistleblower David Grusch, der warnte, dass die USA sich der Überwachung ihrer UAP-Programme durch Russland und China bewusst seien und dass ein weltweiter Wettlauf um die Rückentwicklung der Objekte extreme Auswirkungen auf die nationale Sicherheit habe.

summaries.file-release-department-of-war-publishes: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement. The Department says WAR.GOV/UFO has received over 1 billion hits worldwide since its May 8, 2026 launch, which it frames as evidence of major public interest in the topic and in the Trump administration's transparency effort. The statement adds that the Department of War and agency partners are working on a third UAP file release, which will be announced in the near future.
summaries.uap-disclosure-3-is-the-most-intriguing-: source=post_page---byline--6569862d1eba---------------------------------------) 5 min read 22 hours ago Press enter or click to view image in full size (Image credit: NewsNation) Today, June 9, 2026, a press conference of lawmakers and UAP (Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena) whistleblowers in Washington DC, called for action on UAP disclosure (for access to its full video, click here). Shortly afterwards, I was asked by Nichole Berlie from NewsNation to share my perspective on this press conference. *** **NB:** Here to discuss the UAP disclosure effort and what we have seen from the government release in recent weeks, Professor of Science at Harvard University, Avi Loeb.
summaries.ufo-whistleblower-pushes-vance-to-invest: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue. Lawmakers from the House Oversight and Government Committee’s Task Force on Declassification of Federal Secrets, including Reps. Burlison, Moskowitz, Luna and Burchett, joined the briefing and called for permanent immunity for insiders and for the UAP Disclosure Act to strengthen whistleblower protections. War Secretary Pete Hegseth said the Trump administration is releasing declassified UFO files and is committed to unprecedented transparency, while noting that a dozen scientists and associates have recently gone missing, died or been murdered.
summaries.as-ufos-go-mainstream-the-jury-is-out-on: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion Posted Jun 12, 2026 08:01:58 AM. LOS ANGELES (AP) — In “Disclosure Day,” out Friday, Steven Spielberg is once again inviting audiences to ponder the existence of extraterrestrial life — and the implications it would have for religion on Earth. But Spielberg is hardly the only one making headlines of late about UFOs and the possibility of life on other planets. What was once considered fringe or conspiratorial has in recent months popped up everywhere from the White House to the Catholic Church, as public fascination with unidentified anomalous phenomena — or UAPs, as the government calls them — becomes more mainstream.
summaries.film-close-encounters-ufos-and-cover-ups: Spielberg’s 1977 film *Close Encounters of the Third Kind* focused on government secrecy about UFOs and has become a key reference for his 2026 film *Disclosure Day*, which the director says is not a sequel but shares thematic ties. *Disclosure Day*, released on 12 June 2026 and starring Emily Blunt, follows a whistleblower named Daniel who tries to expose decades of hidden evidence of extraterrestrial visitations, echoing the conspiracy‑thriller style of 1970s movies like *Three Days of the Condor*. The piece notes that real‑world UAP investigations, such as the Pentagon’s 2025 report and 2023 congressional hearings, have produced limited evidence and continued public speculation, mirroring the film’s portrayal of government obfuscation. Spielberg’s trailers and statements emphasize that the new film is part of a growing public fascination with whether we are alone in the universe, centering on the tension between truth‑seeking characters and a clandestine agency that seeks to suppress information.
summaries.uap-disclosure-advocates-set-to-demand-t: On Tuesday, congressional members of the UAP Caucus and whistleblower David Grusch will speak with reporters. They are expected to demand new transparency measures for UAP disclosures. The event is being covered by NewsNation. The article was published on June 7, 2026. No further details about the specific measures or outcomes are provided.
summaries.cosmic-council-trump-creates-ufo-panel-t: The Trump administration has created a UAP Governance Board to address unidentified anomalous phenomena, holding its first meeting on Tuesday and aiming to improve transparency and interagency coordination. Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will serve as an advisor and head the board’s UAP Science Advisory Council, bringing a scientific perspective to the investigation of UAP incidents. The board will operate without a budget, rely only on declassified information, and may help resolve cases such as the 2023 glowing mothership orb near Cheyenne Mountain, while Loeb notes that about 40 % of observed phenomena remain unexplained by known technology. Loeb has assembled a team of scientists and UFO researchers, including Michael Shermer, Gary Nolan, Kevin Knuth, Matthew Szydagis, and retired Rear Admiral Gallaudet, who has urged the government to prioritize UAP research.
summaries.program-new-science-advisory-council-for: A new UAP Science Advisory Council, led by Harvard professor Avi Loeb, has been created to provide scientific guidance to U.S. government agencies investigating unidentified anomalous phenomena. The council will advise the UAP Governance Board, an interagency body established under a Trump administration directive, which coordinates the declassification of UAP information in line with Executive Order 13526. The council’s membership includes experts in anomaly identification, AI, oceanography, psychology, and materials science, and all data shared with the council will be unclassified. AARO’s latest report, dated June 5 2026, documents anomalous phenomena observed in October 2023, noting that about 40 % of the cases lack a reasonable explanation and remain unresolved. While the council aims to determine whether UAPs pose national‑security threats or represent new discoveries, no evidence to date confirms extraterrestrial activity, and the exact nature of the phenomena remains uncertain.

The event is being framed as a direct call for declassification, stronger whistleblower protections, and passage of disclosure-related legislation. Grusch, the former intelligence officer who previously testified under oath before Congress, is expected to discuss non-human intelligence-related evidence he says he encountered through classified channels.
summaries.file-release-jeremy-corbell-issues-ufo-w: Investigative filmmaker Jeremy Corbell has issued a warning to the U.S. government demanding disclosure of alleged UFO crash retrieval, reverse‑engineering, and non‑human biologics programs or else he will release hundreds of undisclosed files. Corbell said that if the government does not provide new information on reverse engineering, non‑human intelligence craft, or biologics, he will release the files he calls “Sleeping Dog.” He claimed that the information is no longer limited to a small group and is not only in his hands or in George Knapp’s. Corbell referenced former intelligence officer David Grusch’s 2023 congressional testimony, which alleged decades‑long crash retrieval and reverse‑engineering of non‑human technology and the existence of biological evidence. No publicly released evidence has independently verified Grusch’s allegations, but his testimony is considered a significant whistleblower claim about UAPs. Corbell’s statement suggests that additional evidence may exist outside official channels.

Jordan Flowers, executive director of the UAP Disclosure Foundation, said the files show foreign adversaries are engaged in research that could threaten U.S. national security. Flowers cited whistleblower David Grusch, who warned that the U.S. is aware of Russian and Chinese surveillance of its UAP programs and that a global race to reverse‑engineer the objects has extreme national‑security implications. The UAP Disclosure Foundation announced a forum in Washington, D.C., on June 25 to discuss the national‑security, technological, and religious implications of UAP disclosure. A CIA cable from July 2, 2008 placed U.S. assets in Zimbabwe on high alert after a UFO hovered over Harare airport, with beams and rotating lights, sparking debate over whether the craft was a foreign reconnaissance device or an extraterrestrial object.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

en.title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal ‘slush funds’ tied to classified programs
en.summary: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue.

de.title: UFO-Whistleblower drängt Vance, angebliche Milliarden von „schwarzen Geldern“ des Bundes zu untersuchen, die mit geheimen Programmen in Zusammenhang stehen
de.summary: Der ehemalige Geheimdienstoffizier David Grusch sagte Reportern, dass Milliarden von Dollar in geheime Bundesprogramme fließen, die mit Initiativen zur UFO-Absturzbergung in Verbindung stehen und vor dem Kongress und der Öffentlichkeit geschützt sind. Er behauptet, der Regierung seien mehrere Dutzend Fälle mit nichtmenschlichen Biologien bekannt und sie verfüge über Audio-, Video- und Bildmaterial von geborgenen Fahrzeugen. Grusch forderte die Sondereinsatzgruppe von Präsident Donald Trump unter der Leitung von Vizepräsident JD Vance auf, die angeblichen Schwarzgelder zu untersuchen, und nannte die Situation ein Betrugs-, Verschwendungs- und Missbrauchsproblem.

LOS ANGELES (AP) — In “Disclosure Day,” out Friday, Steven Spielberg is once again inviting audiences to ponder the existence of extraterrestrial life — and the implications it would have for religion on Earth. de.title: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte – Associated Press
de.summary: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte. Gepostet am 12. Juni 2026 um 08:01:58 Uhr. LOS ANGELES (AP) – In „Disclosure Day“, der am Freitag erscheint, lädt Steven Spielberg das Publikum erneut dazu ein, über die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens nachzudenken – und über die Auswirkungen, die es auf die Religion auf der Erde haben würde. Aber Spielberg ist nicht der Einzige, der in letzter Zeit Schlagzeilen über UFOs und die Möglichkeit von Leben auf anderen Planeten macht.

en.title: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026
en.summary: Spielberg’s 1977 film *Close Encounters of the Third Kind* focused on government secrecy about UFOs and has become a key reference for his 2026 film *Disclosure Day*, which the director says is not a sequel but shares thematic ties. *Disclosure Day*, released on 12 June 2026 and starring Emily Blunt, follows a whistleblower named Daniel who tries to expose decades of hidden evidence of extraterrestrial visitations, echoing the conspiracy‑thriller style of 1970s movies like *Three Days of the Condor*. The piece notes that real‑world UAP investigations, such as the Pentagon’s 2025 report and 2023 congressional hearings, have produced limited evidence and continued public speculation, mirroring the film’s portrayal of government obfuscation.

de.title: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist
de.summary: Spielbergs Film „Close Encounters of the Third Kind“ aus dem Jahr 1977 konzentrierte sich auf Regierungsgeheimnisse über UFOs und ist zu einer wichtigen Referenz für seinen Film „Disclosure Day“ aus dem Jahr 2026 geworden, der nach Aussage des Regisseurs keine Fortsetzung ist, aber thematische Verbindungen aufweist. *Disclosure Day*, veröffentlicht am 12. Juni 2026 und mit Emily Blunt in der Hauptrolle, handelt von einem Whistleblower namens Daniel, der versucht, jahrzehntelang verborgene Beweise für außerirdische Besuche aufzudecken, und greift damit den Verschwörungsthriller-Stil von Filmen der 1970er Jahre wie „Drei Tage des Kondors“ auf. Der Artikel stellt fest, dass reale UAP-Untersuchungen, wie der Bericht des Pentagons aus dem Jahr 2025 und die Anhörungen vor dem Kongress aus dem Jahr 2023, nur begrenzte Beweise und anhaltende öffentliche Spekulationen erbracht haben, was die Darstellung der Verschleierung durch die Regierung im Film widerspiegelt.

en.title: Cosmic Council: Trump creates UFO panel to be advised by Harvard's Avi Loeb
en.summary: The Trump administration has created a UAP Governance Board to address unidentified anomalous phenomena, holding its first meeting on Tuesday and aiming to improve transparency and interagency coordination. Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will serve as an advisor and head the board’s UAP Science Advisory Council, bringing a scientific perspective to the investigation of UAP incidents.

de.title: Kosmischer Rat: Trump gründet ein UFO-Gremium, das von Harvard-Mitarbeiter Avi Loeb beraten wird
de.summary: Die Trump-Administration hat ein UAP-Governance-Board eingerichtet, um sich mit nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen zu befassen. Die erste Sitzung findet am Dienstag statt und zielt darauf ab, die Transparenz und die Koordination zwischen den Behörden zu verbessern. Der Harvard-Astrophysiker Avi Loeb wird als Berater fungieren und den UAP Science Advisory Council des Vorstands leiten und eine wissenschaftliche Perspektive in die Untersuchung von UAP-Vorfällen einbringen.

en.title: New science advisory council forms to help US government ‘resolve the UAP mystery’
en.summary: A new UAP Science Advisory Council, led by Harvard professor Avi Loeb, has been created to provide scientific guidance to U.S. government agencies investigating unidentified anomalous phenomena. The council will advise the UAP Governance Board, an interagency body established under a Trump administration directive, which coordinates the declassification of UAP information in line with Executive Order 13526.

de.title: Neue wissenschaftliche Beiräte bilden sich, um der US-Regierung dabei zu helfen, „das UAP-Rätsel zu lösen“
de.summary: Ein neuer UAP-Wissenschaftsbeirat unter der Leitung von Harvard-Professor Avi Loeb wurde gegründet, um US-Regierungsbehörden bei der Untersuchung nicht identifizierter anomaler Phänomene wissenschaftliche Anleitung zu geben. Der Rat wird das UAP Governance Board beraten, ein behördenübergreifendes Gremium, das gemäß einer Richtlinie der Trump-Regierung eingerichtet wurde und die Freigabe von UAP-Informationen gemäß Executive Order 13526 koordiniert.

en.title: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action
en.summary: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action - USA Herald David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action On Tuesday, June 9 at 1:00 p. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, bipartisan lawmakers, whistleblowers, journalists, and filmmakers are expected to gather on the steps of the U. The event is being framed as a direct call for declassification, stronger whistleblower protections, and passage of disclosure-related legislation.

de.title: David Grusch kehrt zu den Stufen des Kapitols zurück, während der UFO-Enthüllungskampf von der Aussage zur Tat übergeht
de.summary: David Grusch kehrt zu den Stufen des Kapitols zurück, während der UFO-Enthüllungskampf von Zeugenaussagen zu Taten übergeht - USA Herald David Grusch kehrt zu den Stufen des Kapitols zurück, während UFO-Enthüllungskämpfe von Zeugenaussagen zu Taten übergehen David Grusch kehrt zu den Stufen des Kapitols zurück, während UFO-Enthüllungskämpfe von Zeugenaussagen zu Taten übergehen Am Dienstag, den 9. Juni um 13:00 Uhr. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, überparteiliche Gesetzgeber, Whistleblower, Journalisten und Filmemacher werden sich voraussichtlich auf den Stufen der Vereinigten Staaten versammeln. Die Veranstaltung wird als direkter Aufruf zur Freigabe, einem stärkeren Whistleblower-Schutz und der Verabschiedung von Offenlegungsgesetzen dargestellt.

en.title: Jeremy Corbell Issues UFO Warning: Release Reverse-Engineering and Non-Human Biologics Files — or I Will
en.summary: Investigative filmmaker Jeremy Corbell has issued a warning to the U.S. government demanding disclosure of alleged UFO crash retrieval, reverse‑engineering, and non‑human biologics programs or else he will release hundreds of undisclosed files. Corbell said that if the government does not provide new information on reverse engineering, non‑human intelligence craft, or biologics, he will release the files he calls “Sleeping Dog.” He claimed that the information is no longer limited to a small group and is not only in his hands or in George Knapp’s.

de.title: Jeremy Corbell gibt UFO-Warnung heraus: Veröffentlichung von Reverse-Engineering- und nicht-humanen Biologika-Dateien – oder ich werde es tun
de.summary: Der investigative Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell hat eine Warnung an die US-Regierung gerichtet und fordert die Offenlegung angeblicher UFO-Absturz-Bergungs-, Reverse-Engineering- und nicht-humaner Biologika-Programme, andernfalls werde er Hunderte von nicht veröffentlichten Dateien veröffentlichen. Corbell sagte, wenn die Regierung keine neuen Informationen über Reverse Engineering, nichtmenschliche Geheimdienste oder Biologika bereitstellt, werde er die Dateien veröffentlichen, die er „Sleeping Dog“ nennt. Er behauptete, dass die Informationen nicht mehr auf eine kleine Gruppe beschränkt seien und nicht nur in seinen Händen oder in denen von George Knapp lägen.

en.title: Newly released UFO files allege China and Russia retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse-engineer them
en.summary: Newly released UFO files made public on June 12 allege that China and Russia have retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse‑engineer them. Jordan Flowers, executive director of the UAP Disclosure Foundation, said the files show foreign adversaries are engaged in research that could threaten U.S. national security. Flowers cited whistleblower David Grusch, who warned that the U.S. is aware of Russian and Chinese surveillance of its UAP programs and that a global race to reverse‑engineer the objects has extreme national‑security implications.

de.title: In neu veröffentlichten UFO-Dateien wird behauptet, dass China und Russland abgeschossene UAPs zurückgeholt und versucht hätten, sie zurückzuentwickeln
de.summary: Neu veröffentlichte UFO-Dateien, die am 12. Juni veröffentlicht wurden, behaupten, dass China und Russland abgeschossene UAPs geborgen und versucht haben, sie zurückzuentwickeln. Jordan Flowers, Geschäftsführer der UAP Disclosure Foundation, sagte, die Akten zeigten, dass ausländische Gegner an Forschungsarbeiten beteiligt seien, die die nationale Sicherheit der USA gefährden könnten. Flowers zitierte den Whistleblower David Grusch, der warnte, dass die USA sich der Überwachung ihrer UAP-Programme durch Russland und China bewusst seien und dass ein weltweiter Wettlauf um die Rückentwicklung der Objekte extreme Auswirkungen auf die nationale Sicherheit habe.
